title: 2024319Dry
summary:
Main
· Booming dry bulk market defies red flag warnings emerging from the steel complex - Once again, the Capesize sector is leading the dry bulk rally although Panamax rates have also experienced a very strong performance with spot rates now hovering close to the 20,000-mark for the first time since December. Both the Pacific and Atlantic markets remain well supported , each for different reasons, and any indication of softening is perceived as an opportunity to either take-in tonnage (for the physical market) or add to long positions (for the freight futures market). Sentiment is the most positive in years , evident by the secondhand market where transactions are implying future freight rates at very solid levels last seen only during the 2000s shipping bull market.
